summary: Read-only R8 review of Observatory/user-visible proof completion conditions. Inspected memory registry, consensus/completion/verification docs, Observatory server/UI script, health/freshness status builders, direct MCP status schema, Observatory verifier, targeted rg hits, and existing state artifacts. Verdict: AGREE that the plan completion conditions require UI/API visibility for used memory/audit evidence, blockers, pending reviewer/main/verifier lanes, stale proof timestamps, audit/trust score, and CLI/health parity; current implementation still appears to lack the full P1-11 API/UI/verifier surface, but the plan explicitly blocks completion until that surface exists.
decisions: Returned AGREE because docs/OS_REMAINING_GAPS_CONSENSUS_PLAN.md P1-11 explicitly requires shared blocker model, lanes, proof paths/timestamps, audit/trust score, /api/state fields, hard-gate UI rows, CLI parity, and negative Observatory tests.

Treated current Observatory implementation gaps as evidence that P1-11 remains unimplemented rather than as a doc objection, because the plan already names verify:observatory-evidence and acceptance criteria.
next_steps: Implement verify:observatory-evidence and expand /api/state/UI to expose health_status, client_mcp_direct_status agents, blocker rows, stale proof state, pending reviewer/main/verifier lanes, and memory audit details before completion is claimed.
